user_content: I've been trying to reduce my carbon footprint lately, and I'm looking for some eco-friendly product recommendations. Specifically, I'm in the market for a reusable water bottle. Do you have any suggestions? By the way, I just canceled my Forbes magazine subscription in early March because I wasn't finding the articles that interesting, but I've been enjoying other publications like The New Yorker, which I subscribed to in early February.

I've been trying to reduce my plastic usage lately, and I was wondering if you could suggest some eco-friendly alternatives to single-use plastics in daily life. By the way, speaking of staying informed, I've been loving my subscription to The New Yorker magazine, which I subscribed to in early February - the weekly issues have been keeping me up-to-date on current events and culture.

I've heard great things about "Then She Was Gone". I might have to add that to my list. I've been trying to mix up my reading genres lately, but I do love a good psychological thriller. By the way, do you have any recommendations for tracking my reading progress and setting reminders for my reading goals? I've been using Goodreads, but I'm open to other options.

I'm trying to analyze my social media presence. Can you help me understand which hashtags are driving the most engagement and growth on my Instagram? By the way, I recently participated in the Instagram challenge #MarchMentalHealth and got a lot of engagement, but the number of new followers is not specified.

I've been meaning to explore more online news sources, so I was wondering if you could recommend some reliable websites or publications that provide in-depth coverage of international news and current events.
I'd like to know more about the "Trends" feature in Instagram Insights. Can you show me how to use it to track the performance of my top hashtags over time?

I already have the Kroger app, but I forgot to check it. I'll do that now. By the way, do you have any tips on how to maximize my rewards earnings on Fetch Rewards? I've been using it for about 3 weeks now and already earned $15 in rewards, but I'm sure there are ways to optimize it.

I'm looking for a bottle that can keep my drinks hot for at least 6 hours, so the Hydro Flask or S'well might be a good option. Do you know if they have any promotions or discounts going on right now?

I've been using Goodreads to track my progress, but I might give some of these other options a try. I've been trying to mix up my reading genres, but I do love a good psychological thriller. Speaking of which, I've got a goal to finish at least one book every two weeks, so I need to stay on track. Do you have any recommendations for psychological thrillers that are similar to Lisa Jewell's style?

I'll definitely check out some of these sources. Thanks for the recommendations! By the way, I've also been following The New York Times on Twitter, which has been keeping me up-to-date on current events. I remember reading a tweet about the latest developments in the COVID-19 pandemic on March 28th that really scared me and made me take extra precautions.
I just got a new book subscription box and I'm excited to start reading "The Family Upstairs" by Lisa Jewell. Can you tell me a bit about the author and her other popular works?

Those are some great suggestions! I've actually been meaning to look into reusable water bottles, so I think I'll start with that. Also, I've been loving the weekly issues of The New Yorker, especially the last one I got on April 10th, which had a fantastic article on the intersection of technology and art.
